Comfortable Accommodations: Hilton Garden Inn Beijing Daxing International Airport in Beijing offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, free WiFi, and modern amenities. Each room includes a work desk, refrigerator, and free toiletries.
Dining Options: Guests can enjoy a variety of breakfast options, including American, buffet, vegetarian, halal, and Asian. The modern restaurant serves Chinese, local, Asian, and international cuisines for lunch and dinner.
Convenient Facilities: The hotel provides a free airport shuttle service, a fitness room, and a minimarket. Additional services include private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, and room service.

hotels.description_en:
Happy Dragon Alley Hotel is ideally located in the heart of Beijing, a 3-minute walk from ZhangzizhongLu Subway Station (Line 5). Housed in a historic Beijing hutong.
Happy Dragon Alley Hotel  is a 17-minute drive from Wangfujing Pedestrian Street. It takes 20 minutes by subway to many tourist attractions such as Lama Temple, National Museum and Tianâ€™anmen Square. South Luogu Alley, Bell and Drum Towers are a 20-minute walk away. Both Beijing West Railway Station and Beijing South Railway Station can be reached in 40 minutes' drive. Beijing Capital International Airport is 50-minute away and Daxing Airport is 70 minutes by taxi.
There is a 24-hour front desk. The hotelâ€™s tour desk can assist guests with making travel arrangements.
